commands.purpose: Print the compiled FileKindRegistry (every #[FileKind] discovered) + FileTypeStatistics per tenant when --tenant is set. Filter by --kind to inspect a single kind's config + current usage.

commands.signature: storage:reprocess-variants {file? : File ULID} {--kind= : Reprocess every file of this kind} {--tenant= : Reprocess every file of this tenant} {--variant= : Reprocess only this variant key}
commands.purpose: Force regenerate variants after a recipe change. Batches through GenerateFileVariantsJob. Idempotent — skips variants already at the current recipe version.

Requeue ScanFileForVirusesJob for the target file(s). Useful after AV signature database update or scan_failed backlog clear. --state=infected retries only quarantined files (rehab pass after a false-positive signature was corrected upstream).

Manual invocation of DedupOrphanBlobsJob. Reports refcount drift + orphaned blobs (physical bytes with zero File rows referencing them, typically from crashed uploads). --dry-run prints without deleting.
Manual invocation of SyncStorageEntitlementUsageJob for a single tenant or all tenants. Prints the drift + correction table.
Report on content-addressable dedup effectiveness: which sha256 hashes are shared across how many tenants + total bytes saved. --min-shared filters for hashes shared by at least N tenants.
Emergency revocation of every active signed URL for a file. Wraps the DELETE /files/{file}/signed-urls endpoint for CLI use during incidents (leaked signature discovered, user credential compromise).
